meaning: adj.驥醍噪,蜷ｫ驥醍噪,莨ｼ驥醍噪,[蛹望(蛹門粋迚ｩ)豁｣驥醍噪,荳我ｻｷ驥醍噪
examples: One can synthesize each chakra, subtle body, light body and greater auric field.
Colors are more vivid and each person's auric field can be seen by all and is considered to be a normal attribute.
The result is that your own auric fields and Mer-Ka-Na Light Bodies are, through induction, becoming extreme energy in motion.
